message:
feat(core): add FleetScrollbackOrchestrator and enhance tiered scrollback with activity tracking

Add FleetScrollbackOrchestrator to coordinate fleet-wide scrollback eviction
decisions based on per-pane activity counters. The orchestrator identifies idle
panes, produces EvictionPlans with proportional targeting, and supports four
escalating pressure tiers (Normal/Elevated/Critical/Emergency).

Enhance TieredScrollback with:
- Monotonic activity_counter for idle pane detection
- cold_uncompressed_bytes for improved memory reporting
- evict_warm_pages(count) and evict_warm_to_target(bytes) for proportional eviction
- estimated_memory_bytes() for orchestrator integration

Update proptest strategies for new ScrollbackTierSnapshot fields. All tests
pass including 200-pane fleet scenarios and proportional eviction edge cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
